annotations.rubric_point: Relevance of outline points to the given topic
annotations.anchor_quote: Exercise 1: Write a precis of the following passage and suggest a suitable title.
annotations.correction: I. Thesis: Argue that [topic key term] leads to [stance] due to [main reason].
annotations.comment: No points relevant to essay topic; replace precis task with outline addressing essay prompt requirements.

annotations.rubric_point: Coverage of major dimensions and sub-points
annotations.anchor_quote: A drop of water fell out of the cloud into the sea, and finding itself lost in such an immensity of fluid matter,
annotations.correction: II. Body A: Causes - subpoint 1 with example; subpoint 2 with analysis.
annotations.comment: Missing all major essay dimensions like introduction, body arguments, conclusion; add sub-points covering causes, effects, solutions.

annotations.rubric_point: Logical ordering and hierarchy of points
annotations.correction: I. Introduction → II. Body (A,B,C) → III. Counterarguments → IV. Conclusion.
annotations.comment: No logical hierarchy or ordering; reorder into numbered sections progressing from intro to conclusion.

annotations.anchor_quote: By following these steps, you systematically transform a lengthy passage into a concise
annotations.correction: Equal sub-points under Body A (pros), B (cons), C (solutions).
annotations.comment: No balanced sections; entirely precis summary without essay arguments; allocate weight to analysis and solutions.

annotations.rubric_point: Clarity & Precision of Thesis / Central Argument
annotations.anchor_quote: is itself a n structce vith time the past tuation ca e text the pois
annotations.correction: Thesis: The topic requires analysis of [key terms] through [unique stance].
annotations.comment: No thesis statement or clear stance; explicitly state arguable thesis interpreting exact topic wording.

annotations.rubric_point: Relevance of outline points to the given topic
annotations.anchor_quote: Drop of Water Once, a drop into the sea sad fell from cloud which was existence. Suddenly its tiny and negligible and an oyster engulfed after Turned passing into pearl processes. At last through hardening founded this pearl diver and fixed the persian crown by passing through many hands
annotations.correction: Thesis: The drop of water's transformation symbolizes human potential; I. Humility in origins; II. Trials leading to value; III. Ultimate recognition.
annotations.comment: Remove precis summary unrelated to essay prompt; replace with points directly interpreting and arguing the topic's key terms.

annotations.anchor_quote: Once, a drop into the sea sad fell from cloud which was existence.
annotations.correction: I. Introduction with thesis; II. Body: causes/effects with examples; III. Counterarguments; IV. Solutions/conclusion.
annotations.comment: Add sub-points covering all major dimensions like intro, arguments, counterarguments, and conclusion demanded by topic.

annotations.anchor_quote: Suddenly its tiny and negligible and an oyster engulfed after Turned passing into pearl processes.
annotations.comment: Reorder into logical hierarchy with numbered sections progressing from introduction to arguments to conclusion.

annotations.anchor_quote: At last through hardening founded this pearl diver and fixed the persian crown by passing through many hands
annotations.correction: Equal sub-points under Intro (10%), Body arguments (70%), Conclusion (20%) with pros/cons balance.
annotations.comment: Balance sections evenly; allocate weight to analysis/solutions instead of single precis summary.

annotations.rubric_point: Clarity & Precision of Thesis / Central Argument
annotations.correction: Clear thesis: 'Topic X requires Y approach because Z, with balanced analysis.'
annotations.comment: State explicit arguable thesis interpreting topic; avoid vague precis title without analytical stance.
